name: All That Glitters
short_description: All That Glitters is a narrative first person game of about one hour, only available in french as of now. Search a polluted river looking for treasures, discuss with your hallucinations, and find the weapon allowing you to defend yourself against the curse of the Idiot.
detailed_description:
All That Glitters is a french narrative story of about one hour.

Ysobel is a gold prospector who has the annoying habit of accumulating all the waste she finds in the river next to her camp. But her life of solitude will be turned upside down the day she catches a strange talking fish...

An in-place journey 

In All That Glitters, you explore the world from your river, panning for gold from objects that wash up there. Half-treasures, half-waste, mysteries: your companions of fortune will offer you their interpretations... But who to believe?

A major threat: the Asshole

Every year he returns to try to steal your duly accumulated treasures. To end the threat once and for all, you'll need some nuggets. Lots of nuggets.
